name: Inspect Lattice Data
description: Inspect lattice data with budget-controlled rendering. Returns a JSON5 string with structural annotations (entry counts, byte sizes) truncated to fit your byte budget. Larger budgets reveal more detail; smaller budgets show summaries with /* +N more, size */ markers. Use this to understand the shape and content of large or unknown data structures without overwhelming your context. Paths use '/' separators (e.g. 'w/vendors', 'n/notes', 'g/my-agent/timeline'). Namespaces: g = agents, w = workspace, o = operations, n = agent workspace (agent scope only). For multiple paths, pass an array — each gets an equal share of the budget. Returns a single JSON5 string for one path, or a map of path → rendered JSON5 for multiple paths.

paths.description: Path or array of paths to inspect. E.g. 'w/vendors' or ['w/vendors/a', 'w/vendors/b'].

budget.description: Byte budget for the rendered JSON5 output (default 500). Larger budgets show more detail; smaller budgets truncate with structural annotations.

compact.description: If true, render single-line JSON5 output (default). If false, pretty-print with indentation.

result.description: Rendered JSON5 string (single path) or map of path → rendered JSON5 (multiple paths)
